diagrams.title: Signal Flow: Generation to Delivery
diagrams.description: Shows how signals transition from generated to delivered, passing through pending state when blocked
diagrams.purpose: Understand signal lifecycle and where sigpending() fits in the process

diagrams.title: sigpending() Function Interface

diagrams.purpose: Visual reference for sigpending() API and related functions

diagrams.title: Signal Set Operations
diagrams.description: Shows various sigset_t manipulation functions and their effects on a signal set bitmap
diagrams.purpose: Remember signal set manipulation functions and their purposes
